site_description: A free, open-source community portal for residents of Dasmariñas City, Cavite.

hero.title: Welcome to BetterDasmariñas
hero.subtitle: Your community-powered portal for City of Dasmariñas, Cavite — access government services, public officials, and city information.

services.title: City Services
services.description: Find the right service for your needs — from health and education to business permits and disaster preparedness.

health-services.name: Health Services
health-services.description: Free check-ups, vaccines, and medicines through the City Health Office and barangay health centers.

education.name: Education
education.description: Daycare, preschool enrollment, scholarships, and LGU education support programs.

business.name: Business & Livelihood
business.description: Business permits, tax renewal, market stalls, and trade opportunities in Dasmariñas.

social-welfare.name: Social Welfare
social-welfare.description: Assistance for seniors, PWDs, solo parents, and indigent families.

agriculture-fisheries.name: Agriculture & Fisheries
agriculture-fisheries.description: Seeds, fertilizers, veterinary care, and farming support from the city.

infrastructure-public-works.name: Infrastructure
infrastructure-public-works.description: Report damaged roads, request water supply access, and use public facilities.

garbage-waste-disposal.name: Waste Disposal
garbage-waste-disposal.description: Garbage collection schedules, waste segregation guidelines, and disposal requests.

environment.name: Environment
environment.description: Clean-up drives, tree planting, and environmental conservation programs.

disaster-preparedness.name: Disaster Preparedness
disaster-preparedness.description: Emergency response, evacuation routes, and CDRRMO programs for Dasmariñas.

housing-land-use.name: Housing & Land Use
housing-land-use.description: Socialized housing, zoning permits, and relocation sites in the city.

tourism.name: Tourism
tourism.description: Tourist spots, the Paru-Paro Festival, city history, and travel guides.

governmentActivity.title: City Government
governmentActivity.description: Learn about the departments, officials, and activities of the City Government of Dasmariñas.

departments.name: Departments
departments.description: Explore local government departments, agencies, and offices with their mandates, services, and contact details.

news.name: News
news.description: Stay informed with the latest local government news, announcements, and policy updates.

guides-and-regulations.name: Guides and Regulations
guides-and-regulations.description: Access guidelines, rules, regulations, and step-by-step instructions for local government processes.

reports-and-statistics.name: Reports and Statistics
reports-and-statistics.description: Access local government reports, statistical data, and performance metrics.

public-consultations.name: Public Consultations
public-consultations.description: Participate in public consultations and provide feedback on local government decisions.

transparency-documents.name: Transparency Documents
transparency-documents.description: Access Freedom of Information releases and transparency documents for local government accountability.

footer.copyright: © 2025 BetterDasmariñas. All content is public domain unless otherwise specified.

joinUs.stripSubtitle: Help build the future of Dasmariñas through technology
joinUs.bannerSubtitle: Help build a better Dasmariñas City through open-source civic technology.
